event: Stage design for Tales of Hoffmann — At Olympia's
description: A colorful theatrical set design showing an ornate interior with green curtains, gilded balconies, decorative panels, and elaborate chandeliers. A central figure in white stands on a stage or platform beneath a green canopy. The walls are adorned with paintings, medallions, and sculpted figures. The perspective draws the eye upward through multiple levels of decorated architecture. The palette is rich with emerald greens, golds, reds, and deep blues.

_meta.title: At Olympia's. Design for Tales of Hoffmann by J. Offenbach.
